name: Paradoxica
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
explicitMods: Attacks with this Weapon Penetrate 15% Chaos Resistance
Attacks with this Weapon deal Double Damage
flavourText: What has no siblings but is always a twin?

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Adds a buff that deals Physical Damage over time, while increasing Attack Speed and Life Leech. Killing an enemy while this buff is active refreshes the buff duration, and can grant a Frenzy Charge.
explicitMods: 1.2% of Attack Physical Damage Leeched as Life
You take 4% of your Maximum Life per second as Physical Damage
You take 4% of your Maximum Energy Shield per second as Physical Damage
25% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Kill
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 54% increased Attack Speed
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Wrath Grasp
explicitMods: 0.58% of Physical Attack Damage Leeched by Enemy as Life

name: Eyes of the Greatwolf
flavourText: I am but a vessel for a greater force.
It acts through me. Speaks through me.
Decides what lives and dies through me.
And will change the world through me.

typeLine: Seething Divine Life Flask of Warding
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

typeLine: Seething Divine Life Flask of Insulation
explicitMods: Grants Immunity to Shock for 14 seconds if used while Shocked
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Fate Hold
explicitMods: 23% of Damage taken Recouped as Life
craftedMods: Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost

name: Loath Clutches
implicitMods: Non-Vaal Strike Skills target 2 additional nearby Enemies
explicitMods: Adds 2 to 5 Physical Damage to Attacks

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will track damage you take, and be triggered when the total damage taken reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods: This Gem can only Support Skill Gems requiring Level 44 or lower
Trigger Supported Spells when you take 725 total Damage from Hits
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Take less Physical and Elemental Damage for a short time. Consumes up to 5 Endurance Charges to lengthen the buff and further lessen Physical Damage taken. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: 20% increased Buff Duration per Endurance Charge removed
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
15.0% less Physical Damage taken per Endurance Charge removed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill with a duration.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 49% more Skill Effect Duration
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that have a cooldown. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 45% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "The science is... incomprehensible at best. Nearest I can tell, the Arcana exhibits
a blast of wrath once it has been fully charged, and when directed at the Elder
will force it to take on the form it held before it entered our dimension."

name: Rathpith Globe
explicitMods: Sacrifice 10% of your Life when you Use or Trigger a Spell Skill
5% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance per 100 Player Maximum Life
5% increased Spell Damage per 100 Player Maximum Life
flavourText: The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Desecrates the ground, spawning corpses based on monsters in the current area and dealing chaos damage over time to enemies. If you are using the Raise Spectre skill there is a chance to spawn spectral corpses matching your most recently raised Spectres. Spectral corpses cannot be interacted with except by Minion skills.
explicitMods: Deals 294 Base Chaos Damage per second
Spawned corpses' level matches the area level, up to a maximum of Level 80
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Chaos, Curse, Hex

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, lowering their chaos resistance.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies have -30% to Chaos Resistance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Engulfs you in magical fire that rapidly burns you and nearby enemies. Your spell damage is substantially increased while under this effect. The effect ends when you have 1 life remaining.
explicitMods: Deals 70% of your Maximum Life as Base Fire Damage per second
Deals 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield as Base Fire Damage per second
You Burn for 90% of your Maximum Life per second as Fire Damage
You Burn for 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield per second as Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods:
Sacrifices 60% of your total Energy Shield and Life
Deals 120% of Sacrificed Energy Shield and Life as Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Skill Effect Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention
hybrid.secDescrText: Sacrifices a portion of your Life and Energy Shield to engulf you in magical fire that rapidly burns nearby enemies for a duration. Your spell damage is increased while under this effect.

name: Phoenix Finger
craftedMods: Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost

name: Crown of Eyes
implicitMods: Socketed Skill Gems get a 90% Cost & Reservation Multiplier
explicitMods: 0.64% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
0.21% of Attack Damage Leeched as Mana
Increases and Reductions to Spell Damage also apply to Attacks at 150% of their value
flavourText: Turning, gazing, blinking,
behold the eyes of void.
Burning, razing, drinking,
your mind is destroyed.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 19% less Damage from Enemies in Aura
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants elemental resistances and elemental ailment immunity to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain +39% to all Elemental Resistances
You and nearby allies are Immune to all Elemental Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Cold, Travel, Blink, AoE

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving Chilled ground in an area at both ends of the teleport. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods:
15% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Normal or Magic Enemy in Area
83% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

implicitMods: Gain 4 Rage on Melee Weapon Hit
descrText: Right click to activate. Only one Tincture in your belt can be active at a time. Mana Burn causes you to lose 1% of your maximum Mana per stack per second. Can be deactivated manually, or will automatically deactivate when you reach 0 Mana.

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

name: Replica Alberon's Warpath
explicitMods: Adds 1 to 80 Chaos Damage to Attacks per 80 Strength
flavourText: "Starving test subject became completely incapable of exerting force.
However, after being fed, he began to poison everything he touched..."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Repeatedly hit enemies in a circle in front of you while channelling, dealing damage to and around the enemy. The damage is continually boosted while channelling. You unleash an additional hit for each stage reached once the channelling ends. Requires a Dagger, Claw or One-Handed Sword.
explicitMods: 20% more Damage while at maximum Stages
25% more Damage with Hits and Ailments for each stage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a warcry, taunting nearby enemies to attack the user, and summoning Mirage Warriors from nearby corpses. The Mirage Warriors each use a linked attack skill once before dissipating.
explicitMods: Counts total Power of Enemies and Corpses in Range
Summons Mirage Warriors from 2 corpses per 5 Power, minimum 1 corpse
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Strike Skills cannot target additional Enemies
Attacks with Supported Skills count as Exerted

Supported Skills are used by Mirage Warriors Summoned by General's Cry
Supported Skills count as Triggered

Supported Warcries are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
Supported Skills' Base Mana Cost is 10
Supported Warcries do not grant Buffs or Charges to You or Allies
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports warcry skills. Cannot support retaliation skills or modify the skills of minions.

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Echoing Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

name: The Iron Fortress
explicitMods: +1% Chance to Block Attack Damage per 50 Strength
Chance to Block Spell Damage is Unlucky

Strength's Damage Bonus instead grants 3% increased Melee
Physical Damage per 10 Strength
flavourText: "Stand steadfast in the face of destruction.
The Council cannot afford to falter."
- Mauritius, the Iron Heart

he seemed to grow larger and more frightening, drawing
increasingly fervorous responses from his rapt audience.

forth to stand and fight against a great tide."
